conflict: Spike's syndicate past as a system that damaged people he never saw — the shift from personal mythology to collateral consequence
consequence: Spike confronts the human cost of syndicate logistics he built; the mystery narrows to a courier named Ayane who worked routes Spike created; Spike's emotional distance cracks
must_land_beats: Spike examines the annotated manifest — immunosuppressants routed through a weapons pipeline, someone's life depending on logistics he never thought about
Hector Moro at The Radiant describes the young woman asking patient, well-funded questions about old syndicate routes
Hector remembers Ayane — quiet, reliable, not syndicate by choice, ran supplies because her husband was killed and she had a kid
Spike's recognition that the syndicate was not just something that happened to him but something that happened through him
pressure_source: Spike's syndicate past as a system that damaged people he never saw — the shift from personal mythology to collateral consequence
state_shift: Spike confronts the human cost of syndicate logistics he built; the mystery narrows to a courier named Ayane who worked routes Spike created; Spike's emotional distance cracks
